ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run “Simple Progress Bar: Insert inline progress bar” from the command palette to insert an inline progress bar for the current heading section.
ast.target: 从命令面板运行“Simple Progress Bar: Insert inline progress bar”命令，为当前标题部分插入一个内联进度条。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste this code block into a note to show progress for the current section. Change the text between the opening and closing lines to update the progress bar label.
ast.target: 将此代码块粘贴到笔记中，以显示当前部分的进度。更改开头和结尾行之间的文本以更新进度条标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displays progress for all markdown tasks in the active note.
ast.target: 显示活动笔记中所有 Markdown 任务的进度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command palette: Toggle note progress bar, Show note progress bar, Hide note progress bar.
ast.target: 命令面板：切换笔记进度条、显示笔记进度条、隐藏笔记进度条。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show note progress in the note header
ast.target: 在笔记标题中显示笔记进度

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a markdown note to insert a progress bar.
ast.target: 打开一个 Markdown 笔记以插入进度条。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Shows task progress in the note header and supports inline section progress bars.
ast.target: 在笔记标题中显示任务进度，并支持内联章节进度条。
